title: Code and data for "Weibull random fields for spatially dependent positive data: an application to mining haul roads"
description: Code, data, and precomputed outputs supporting the accepted article "Weibull random fields for spatially dependent positive data: an application to mining haul roads".
notes: Funding: ANID FONDECYT Iniciacion 11250479; ANID FONDECYT Regular 1250862; ANID FONDEF IDeA ID22I10348.
